mapper.sql: task_id, incident_id, dispatch_request_id, assignment_id, agent_id, issue_vendor, issue_id, issue_url, issue_status, sync_status, issue_action_id, issue_action_type, issue_action_status, issue_retryable, issue_comment_mode, agent_summary, issue_comment_preview, last_synced_at, sync_error, message, last_adapter_action_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into task_issue_links () values ( #{link.taskId}, #{link.incidentId}, #{link.dispatchRequestId}, #{link.assignmentId}, #{link.agentId}, #{link.issueVendor}, #{link.issueId}, #{link.issueUrl}, #{link.issueStatus}, coalesce(#{link.syncStatus}, 'SYNC_PENDING'), #{link.issueActionId}, #{link.issueActionType}, #{link.issueActionStatus}, #{link.issueRetryable}, coalesce(#{link.issueCommentMode}, 'APPEND'), #{link.agentSummary}, #{link.issueCommentPreview}, #{link.lastSyncedAt}, #{link.syncError}, #{link.message}, #{link.lastAdapterActionAt}, coalesce(#{link.createdAt}, now()), coalesce(#{link.updatedAt}, now()) ) on conflict (task_id) do update set incident_id = coalesce(excluded.incident_id, task_issue_links.incident_id), dispatch_request_id = coalesce(excluded.dispatch_request_id, task_issue_links.dispatch_request_id), assignment_id = coalesce(excluded.assignment_id, task_issue_links.assignment_id), agent_id = coalesce(excluded.agent_id, task_issue_links.agent_id), issue_vendor = coalesce(excluded.issue_vendor, task_issue_links.issue_vendor), issue_id = coalesce(excluded.issue_id, task_issue_links.issue_id), issue_url = coalesce(excluded.issue_url, task_issue_links.issue_url), issue_status = coalesce(excluded.issue_status, task_issue_links.issue_status), sync_status = excluded.sync_status, issue_action_id = coalesce(excluded.issue_action_id, task_issue_links.issue_action_id), issue_action_type = coalesce(excluded.issue_action_type, task_issue_links.issue_action_type), issue_action_status = coalesce(excluded.issue_action_status, task_issue_links.issue_action_status), issue_retryable = excluded.issue_retryable, issue_comment_mode = coalesce(excluded.issue_comment_mode, task_issue_links.issue_comment_mode), agent_summary = coalesce(excluded.agent_summary, task_issue_links.agent_summary), issue_comment_preview = coalesce(excluded.issue_comment_preview, task_issue_links.issue_comment_preview), last_synced_at = coalesce(excluded.last_synced_at, task_issue_links.last_synced_at), sync_error = excluded.sync_error, message = coalesce(excluded.message, task_issue_links.message), last_adapter_action_at = coalesce(excluded.last_adapter_action_at, task_issue_links.last_adapter_action_at), updated_at = coalesce(excluded.updated_at, now())
mapper.select: select * from task_issue_links order by updated_at desc limit #{limit}
